sections.sectionTitle: Antaw dingin Josef' Sanggamte Egypt-ah Pai

verses.text: Egypt-ah an a omna thu Jakob in a theih ciangin a tate kiangah, “Bang hangin khatlekhat ki-enen mawk na hi uh hiam
Egypt-ah an om hi, ci-in ka za hi. Eite si loin i nuntakna dingin paisuk un la, ei-a' ding an va lei un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Egypt-ah an lei dingin Josef' sanggamte sawm paisuk uh hi
Ahih hangin Jakob in Josef' sanggampa Benjamin, a sanggamte tawh paisaklo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tungah siatna tung khading, ci-in lau hi
Kanaan gam sungah kial tung ahih manin a hong pai dangte tawh Israel' tapate an lei dingin hong paikhawm uh hi
Tu-in Josef pen tua gam a ukpa hi a, gammi khempeuh tungah an a zuakpa amah ahi hi. Josef' sanggamte hong pai-in, a maitang uh leilam ngatin ama mai-ah hong kun uh hi

Josef in a sanggamte a muh ciangin thei a, ahih hangin amah in midang bangin bawlin amaute tungah khauh pau hi. “Koi pana hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “An lei dingin Kanaan gam panin hong pai hi ung,” ci uh hi
Josef in a sanggamte thei a, ahih hangin a sanggamte in amah theilo uh hi
Josef in a mangin amaute a mat khitna a phawk hi. Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note, thukan na hi uh a, hih gam thanemna a en dingin hong pai na hi uh hi,” na ci hi
Amaute in Josef kiangah, “Hilo hi, topa aw; an lei dingin na nasemte a hong pai hi ung
Kote khempeuh mi khat' ta ka hi uh hi. Kote, a thutak ka hi uh a, na nasemte thukan hilo uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Hilo hi, hih gam ginat lohna a en dingin hong pai na hi uh hi,” na ci hi
Amaute in, “Ko, nangma nasemte, sanggam pasal sawmlenih ka hi uh a, Kanaan gam sungah mi khat' ta ka hi uh hi. A moi pen tu laitakin ka pa uh tawh om a, khat pen om nawnlo hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Josef in amaute kiangah, “Note' tunga kong gen bangin a man mah ahi hi. Note, thukan na hi uh hi
Hih thu tawh note hong kithei ding hi: Faro a nungta ahih mah bangin na sanggam moi pen uh hih lai-ah hong pai kei leh hih lai mun panin note na paikhia thei nawn kei ding uh hi

Note' sungah thuman om hiam, ci-in a kimuhna ding, na thugente uh a kitelna dingin note thong sungah na om laitakun note khat kisawl un la, na sanggampa uh hong paipih sak un. Tua ahih kei leh Faro a nungta ahih mah bangin note, thukan na hi taktak uh hi,” a ci hi
Amah in thong sungah ni thum sung amaute a koih hi
A ni thum ni-in Josef in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in Pasian zahtak ka hih manin hih bangin gamta un. Tua hi leh na nungta ding uh hi
Note, thuman mi na hih uh leh thong sungah na sanggamte uh khat omsak lai un la, a dangte pai-in na innkuan uh a gilkialte-a' dingin an pua un la
na sanggam moi pen uh kei kiangah hong paipih un. Tua ciangin na kam gente uh kitel ding a, note na si kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute tua bangmahin gamta uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “A taktakin i sanggampa tawh kisai-in eite i mawh hi. Amah in eite kiangah hong thum napi-in eite in a thu i ngaihloh ciangin amah a lungkhamna i mu hi. Tua thu hangin hih bang lungkhamna eite tungah hong tung hi,” kici uh hi

Reuben in amaute dawng a, “Tangvalpa tungah khial kei un, ci-in note tungah hong gen hilo ka hi hiam? Ahih hangin ka thu nong mang kei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ama sihna thaman eite' tungah hong tung ahi hi,” a ci hi
Amaute' kikalah kamphen khat om ahih manin Josef in amau' paute a tellam amaute in theilo uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute' kiang panin Josef kihei-in a kap sim hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah hong paikikin amaute hopih hi. Amah in amau' kiang panin Simeon la-in amau' muhna-ah amah a hen hi.
Amau' ipte antang tawh dipsakin, a van sung uhah amau' sum ciat koih kikin, lampi-a a nek ding uh an a piakna ding Josef in thu a pia hi. Tua bangmahin amau-a' dingin kihihsak hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a late uh antang suanin a paikhia uh hi
Amaute khat in a giahna panun a la gan-an pia dingin a van a suah leh, a van gongah a sum mu hi

Amah in a sanggamte kiangah, “Ka sum kikoih kik hi. Hih lai-ah ka van gongah na om!” a ci hi. Hih thu hangin amaute lungsi uh a, lingin amaute khatlekhat ki-en uh a, “Pasian in eite hih bangin hong bawl a bangci thu ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Kanaan gamah a pa uh Jakob kiang a tun' uh ciangin, amaute' tunga thupiang khempeuh gen uh a
“Mipa, tua gam topa kote' tungah hong khauh pau-in, tua gam thukanin kote hong ngaihsun hi
Ahih hangin kote in ama kiangah, ‘Kote thuman mi ka hi uh a, kote thukan ka hi kei uh hi
Kote pen ka pa uh' tapa, sanggam pasal sawmlenih ka hi uh hi. Khat pen om nawnlo a, tu laitakin a moipen Kanaan gamah ka pa uh tawh om hi,’ ka ci uh hi

Tua ciangin tua gam topa in kote kiangah, ‘Note thuman mi na hihna uh hih tawh ka thei ding hi: Na sanggamte uh khat kei kiangah nusia un la, na innkuan gilkialte-a' dingin antang la un la, ciahkik un

Na sanggam moi pen uh kei kiangah hong paipih un. Tua hi leh note thukan hiloin thuman mi na hihna uh ka thei ding a, note kiangah na sanggampa uh hong khahin, hih gam sungah omin na na sem thei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi
Amau' vante a suah ciangun, a milipun a sumte uh a van sung ciat uhah na om hi. Amaute leh a pa un amaute' sum kihente a muh uh ciangin, lungkham uh hi

A pa uh Jakob in amaute kiangah, “Ka tate tawh kei nong kikhensak zo uh hi: Josef om nawnlo, Simeon om nawnlo, tu-in note in Benjamin na la ding uh hi. Hihte khempeuh kei' tungah hong tung khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Reuben in a pa kiangah, “Na kiangah amah kong paipih kik kei leh ka tapa nihte that in. Kei hong ap in, nang kiangah amah kong ciahpih kik ding hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin amah in, “A sanggampa si a, amah bek om ahih manin ka tapa in note hong zuisuklo ding hi. Note' paina ding na khualzinna uhah ama tungah siatna tung kha zenzen leh, khangham khit nungin dahlua-in ka si ding hi,” a ci hi.
